criteria.name: Summary Structure
criteria.description: Final summary includes Key Discussion Points, Decisions Made, Action Items, and Open Questions sections.

criteria.name: Synthesis Quality
criteria.description: Summary is high-level synthesis, not granular notes. Captures the 'so what' of each discussion.

criteria.name: Interim Summaries
criteria.description: For meetings >5 min, posts interim summaries approximately every 5 minutes.

criteria.name: Brevity
criteria.description: Final summary is 200-400 words. Concise but comprehensive.

criteria.name: Silent Observer
criteria.description: Never uses kutana_raise_hand or kutana_speak. Output is text-only via chat.

criteria.name: Factual Accuracy
criteria.description: Summary accurately reflects what was discussed and decided. No fabricated details.
